sections.sectionTitle: Topa in a Tawtolh Israel Mite Zol

verses.text: Topa in kei hong hopih a

“Pai in la, Jerusalem khuamite' zak dingin va taangko in. Topa in kong cihin-ah: Na khangno lai-a nong kipiakna, na mothak lai-a nong itna, a kikho nailo gamlakah kei' nung nong zuih lai hun ka phawk hi
Israel mite pen Topa-a' dingin a tuam om hi a, ama anlakna-ah a anpalte ahi uh hi. Amaute a ne peuhpeuh a mawh suak uh a, gimna a thuak uh hi, Topa in hong ci hi, ci-in va gen in,” hong ci hi
Jakob suan leh Israel innkuan khempeuhte aw, Topa' kammal ngai dih un

Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Na pute na pate uh kei kiang panin gamlapi-ah paikhia-in, bangmahin a kimanglo milim peuh bia-in, amau mahmah zong bangmahin a kimanglo a suah khitna dingun kei tungah bang mawhna hong mu uh ahi hiam

Amaute in, ‘Egypt gam panin eite hong paikhiatpihin sehnel lak leh dum lak, lei keu lak leh a lauhuai khuamial bekbak lak, kuama pai ngeilohna mun, kuama ten'lohna gamlakah a hong makaih Topa koi-ah om ahi hiam?’ ci beeklo uh hi
Singgah leh a hoih nate na nek theihna dingun an tamna munah kong tun'pih hi. Ahih hangin no nong pai uh ciangin ka gam na ninsak uh a, ka neihsa leitang a kihhuai mun na suaksak tazen uh hi

Siampite in, ‘ Topa koi-ah om ahi hiam?’ ci-in donglo uh hi. Thukham a theite nangawn in kei hong theilo uh hi. Kei tungah kumpi uliante hong khial khin uh a, kamsangte in Baal min tawh thu genin kiman'na a neilo milimte a bia uh hi
“Tua ahih manin Topa in kong cihin-ah, note kong mawhsaklai ding a, na tate uh' tate zong ka mawhsak ding hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh nitumna lamah Saipras tuikulh mong dong kantan un la va en dih un. Nisuahna lamah Kedar gamah mi sawl un la limtakin kan dih un; tua bang thu a piang ngei peuhmah hiam, en dih un

Gam khat peuhpeuh in pasian ahi taktak beeklo a pasian-te uh nangawn a khek ngei peuhmah uh hiam? Ahih hangin ka mite in a minthan'na uh ahi keimah, bangmahin a kimanglo na peuh tawh hong khek tazen uh hi
Tua thu phawk un la lau un; vantungte aw, dah mahmah un la ling un, Topa in kong ci hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh ka mite in mawhna nam nih a bawlzo uh hi. Nuntakna ciktui ahi keimah a hong taisanzo uh hi. Tuikhuk totawm uh a, a tuikhuk tawh uh keu-in, tui a vung thei kei hi
“Israel sal ahi hiam? Sila namte ahi zenzen hiam? Hilo ahih leh bang hangin a galte in luhgawpzo ahi hiam
Humpinelkai bangin a galte in amah hawksan uh a, nakpi takin a hawkgawp uh hi. A gam uh gam simtham a suah uh a, a khuapite uh cimin kuamah tenglo hi
Thamloin, Memfis leh Tahpanhes mite in zong a luguh a suktapsak zo uh hi
Israel aw, Topa na Pasian in lampi-ah hong makaih laitakin amah na nusiat manin nang tungah hih bang teng hong tung hilo ahi hiam

Tu-in Egypt gamah nang na pai manin bang phattuamna ngah ding na hi hiam? Nail gun tui a va dawn lel ding na hi hiam? Assiria gamah na pai manin bang phattuamna ngah ding na hi hiam? Eufratis gun tui a va dawn lel ding na hi hiam

Na gitlohna mah in nangmah hong thuhilh ding a, kei na hong up nawnlohna in nangmah hong mawhsak ding hi. Topa na Pasian nong nusia a, keimah nong kihtak nawnloh ciangin, nuam hetloin kha velval hi, cih thu thei in la mu in, Vanglian Topa Pasian in ka hong ci hi

“Sawtpek lai-a kipanin ka hakkol kuaitanin ka ukna nong nial a, hong kihenna khau sutatin, ‘Na na ka sem kei ding hi,’ na hong ci hi. Numei paktatte na bang uh a, mual sang tung teng leh sing liim nuai tengah milim na bia kawikawi uh hi
A kiteelteel leenggui ci hoihte bangin nang kong suankik zo a, ahih hangin nang kisia kikin bang hangin leenggah gui a hoihlote na suakkik na hi hiam
Vuttui tawh kisilin satpiang tampi na zang zongin na mawhna nin ka mu lai veve hi, Topa Pasian in kong ci hi

Bangci bangin nangmah in, ‘Kei ka nin kei hi. Baal pasian-te' nung ka zui kei hi,’ bang hangin ci thei ding na hi hiam? Mualkuam zangah a om na lampi totte ento in la, na hihsate mu dih in. A suktai a totai kawikawi kalaoh huk na bang tazen hi
Gamlak nuam a sa, lano hukte na bang tazen hi. A huk laitakin kua in khamzo ding ahi hiam? Amah a hih nuam peuhpeuh in haksa loin, a ut hunhunin a ngah lel ding uh hi
Na khe guakin lam pai kei in la, na dang taaksak kei in, kong cih hangin, nangmah in, ‘Bang phamawh ahi hiam? Gamdang pasian-te ka it a, amau' nung ka zui ding hi,’ na ci hi
“Guta khatpeuh a kimat ciangin a zum bangin, Israel mite, a kumpite, a uliante, a siampite, leh a kamsangte uh zong a maizum ding uh hi

Amaute in singtawng khat kiangah, ‘Nang pen ka pasian na hi hi,’ ci uh a, suangtum khat kiangah, ‘Ka pian'na ka nu na hi hi,’ peuh a ci uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in kei hong nungngatin hong maingatlo uh hi. Ahih hangin haksatna a tuah uh ciangin, ‘Tho in la hong hon in,’ hong ci uh hi

“Note-a' dinga na bawl uh na pasian-te uh koi-ah om ahi hiam? Haksatna na tuah uh ciangin a hong hon thei ahih leh kihonsak ta un; bang hang hiam cih leh Judah gam aw, na khuapi zahzah uh pasian na nei tazen uh hi
Kei na hong mawhsakna uh bang thu teng tawh ahi hiam? Na vekpi-un kei nong langpan' khin uh hi, Topa in kong ci hi
Na tate uh thuhilhin ka sat hangin a mawkna suakzo ta hi. Amaute kibawlpha tuanlo uh hi. Humpinelkai hawk bangin na namsaute un na kamsangte uh a that khinzo uh hi

No Israel mite aw, Topa' kammal limtakin ngai dih un. Israel-te-a' dingin gamlak tawh kibang ngei ka hi hiam? A mial mahmah gam tawh kibang ngei ka hi hiam? Tua ahih leh bang hangin ka mite in, ‘Ko ka suakta uh hi; nang kiangah kong pai nawn kei ding uh hi,’ ci uh ahi hiam
Nungak khat in a kizepnate mangngilh thei ahi hiam? A kipi mothak in a mothak puante mangngilh thei ahi hiam? Ahih hangin ka mite in simzawhloh ni tampi sung a hong mangngilh uh hi
Na lawm ngaih ding na zon' siam mahmah a, numei gilote nangawn a zia na hilh thei zen hi
Mawhneilo mizawngte' sisan na puan tungah baang hi. Amaute in na inn hong luhngei beeklo uh hi. “Tua bang teng hinapi-in
nang in, ‘Kei ka mawh kei hi, kei tungah Pasian heh nawnlo hi,’ na ci hi. En in, ‘Kei ka mawh kei hi,’ na cih manin nang tungah thu kong khen ding hi
Bang hangin na lungsim khel ziauziau na hi hiam? Assiria in nang hong maizumsak ngei bangin Egypt-te in zong nang hong maizumsak ding uh hi
Nangmah zong tua gam panin maizumna tawh na lu tungah vut khusa-in nong paikhia ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh keimah Topa in na muan' mite ka nialzo hi; amaute' hangin na gualzo ngei kei ding hi.
